lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਟਿਕਾ ਸੋ ਬੈਹਣਾ ਸੋਈ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: so ttikaa so baihanaa soee deebaan |
lines.english: The same mark on the forehead, the same throne, and the same Royal Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਯੂ ਦਾਦੇ ਜੇਵਿਹਾ ਪੋਤਾ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: piyoo daade jevihaa potaa paravaan |
lines.english: Just like the father and grandfather, the son is approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਦਹ ਰਤਨ ਨਿਕਾਲਿਅਨੁ ਕੀਤੋਨੁ ਚਾਨਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: chaudah ratan nikaalian keeton chaanaan |
lines.english: He extracted the fourteen jewels, and brought forth the Divine Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਮੁੰਦੁ ਵਿਰੋਲਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਮੇਰੁ ਮਧਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin samund viroliaa kar mer madhaan |
lines.english: he churned the ocean of the world with his churning stick, the Sumayr mountain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਬਾਸਕੁ ਨੇਤ੍ਰੈ ਘਤਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਨੇਹੀ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin baasak netrai ghatiaa kar nehee taan |
lines.english: He took the thousand-headed serpent as his churning string, and with the force of devotional love,

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਣਖੁ ਚੜਾਇਓ ਸਤ ਦਾ ਜਸ ਹੰਦਾ ਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhanakh charraaeo sat daa jas handaa baan |
lines.english: He placed the arrow of the Lord's Praise in the bow of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੋੜਾ ਕੀਤੋ ਸਹਜ ਦਾ ਜਤੁ ਕੀਓ ਪਲਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: ghorraa keeto sehaj daa jat keeo palaan |
lines.english: He made intuition his horse, and chastity his saddle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਹੁ ਖੇਤੁ ਜਮਾਇਓ ਸਤਹੁ ਛਾਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: satahu khet jamaaeo satahu chhaavaan |
lines.english: He farms the field of Truth, and spreads out the canopy of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਧੂ ਅੰਧਾਰੁ ਸਾ ਚੜਿਆ ਰੈ ਭਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: kal vich dhoo andhaar saa charriaa rai bhaan |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, there was only pitch darkness. Then, He rose like the sun to illuminate the darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਰਸੋਈ ਤੇਰੀਐ ਘਿਉ ਮੈਦਾ ਖਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: nit rasoee tereeai ghiau maidaa khaan |
lines.english: Your kitchen always has ghee and flour to eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿਓ ਕਰਿ ਨਦਰਿ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aavaa gaun nivaario kar nadar neesaan |
lines.english: You eliminate the comings and goings of reincarnation, and bestow the insignia of Your Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾਂ ਸੁਝੀਓਸੁ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaan sujheeos man meh sabad paravaan |
lines.english: You understand the four corners of the universe; in your mind, the Word of the Shabad is approved and supreme.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਤਰਿਆ ਅਉਤਾਰੁ ਲੈ ਸੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aautariaa aautaar lai so purakh sujaan |
lines.english: You are the Avataar, the Incarnation of the all-knowing Primal Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਖੜਿ ਵਾਉ ਨ ਡੋਲਈ ਪਰਬਤੁ ਮੇਰਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jhakharr vaau na ddolee parabat meraan |
lines.english: You are not pushed or shaken by the storm and the wind; you are like the Sumayr Mountain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨੁ ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਵਸੀ ਸੋ ਸਤੇ ਦਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: daan ji satigur bhaavasee so sate daan |
lines.english: Those blessings granted by the Pleasure of the True Guru - please bless Satta with those gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਚੇ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ਜਾਂ ਤੂ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa saalaahee sache paatisaah jaan too sugharr sujaan |
lines.english: How can I praise You, O True Supreme King, when You are so wise and all-knowing?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਣੈ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਜਾਣੀ ਹੂ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaanai birathaa jeea kee jaanee hoo jaan |
lines.english: You know the inner state of the soul; You are the Knower of knowers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਟਿਕਾ ਸੋ ਬੈਹਣਾ ਸੋਈ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: so ttikaa so baihanaa soee deebaan |
lines.english: The same mark on the forehead, the same throne, and the same Royal Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੰਦਾ ਛਤ੍ਰੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਉਮਤਿ ਹੈਰਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak handaa chhatru sir umat hairaan |
lines.english: Seeing Nanak's canopy waving over Your head, everyone was astonished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਯੂ ਦਾਦੇ ਜੇਵਿਹਾ ਪੋਤ੍ਰਾ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: piyoo daade jevihaa potraa paravaan |6|
lines.english: Just like the father and grandfather, the son is approved. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਤਿਨੈ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan raamadaas gur jin siriaa tinai savaariaa |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is Guru Raam Daas; He who created You, has also exalted You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੀ ਹੋਈ ਕਰਾਮਾਤਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੈ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: pooree hoee karaamaat aap sirajanahaarai dhaariaa |
lines.english: Perfect is Your miracle; the Creator Lord Himself has installed You on the throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਖੀ ਅਤੈ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਨਮਸਕਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sikhee atai sangatee paarabraham kar namasakaariaa |
lines.english: The Sikhs and all the Congregation recognize You as the Supreme Lord God, and bow down to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਟਲੁ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਅਤੋਲੁ ਤੂ ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: attal athaahu atol too teraa ant na paaraavaariaa |
lines.english: You are unchanging, unfathomable and immeasurable; You have no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਢੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਪਰਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: lab lobh kaam krodh mohu maar kadte tudh saparavaariaa |
lines.english: Greed, envy, sexual desire, anger and emotional attachment - You have beaten them and driven them out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਤੂੰ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਭਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਸੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee toon seviaa bhaau kar se tudh paar utaariaa |
lines.english: Those who serve You with love - You carry them across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤੂ ਲਹਣਾ ਤੂਹੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਮਰੁ ਤੂ ਵੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naanak too lahanaa toohai gur amar too veechaariaa |
lines.english: You are Nanak, You are Angad, and You are Amar Daas; so do I recognize You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਥਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਪੈਸਕਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su teraa thaan hai sach teraa paisakaariaa |
lines.english: Blessed is Your place, and True is Your magnificent glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਡਿਠਾ ਤਾਂ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਧਾਰਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur dditthaa taan man saadhaariaa |7|
lines.english: When I saw the Guru, then my mind was comforted and consoled. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਜਾਗੇ ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗੀ ਪੰਚਾਇਣੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: chaare jaage chahu jugee panchaaein aape hoaa |
lines.english: The four Gurus enlightened the four ages; the Lord Himself assumed the fifth form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਟੀ ਕਲਮ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਲਿਖਣਹਾਰਾ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape pattee kalam aap aap likhanahaaraa hoaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the paper, He Himself is the pen, and He Himself is the writer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੀਨੑੈ ਆਪੁ ਸਾਜਿਓਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਥੰਮੑਿ ਖਲੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapeenai aap saajion aape hee thama khaloaa |
lines.english: He created Himself, and He Himself is the supporting pillar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਉਮਤਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਵਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਨਵਾ ਨਿਰੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh umat aavan jaavanee aape hee navaa niroaa |
lines.english: All His followers come and go; He alone is fresh and new.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਖਤਿ ਬੈਠਾ ਅਰਜਨ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਖਿਵੈ ਚੰਦੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: takhat baitthaa arajan guroo satigur kaa khivai chandoaa |
lines.english: Guru Arjun sits on the throne; the royal canopy waves over the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਪਇਆ ਮੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee guroo na sevio manamukhaa peaa moaa |
lines.english: Those self-willed manmukhs who do not serve the Guru die in shame.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਗਵਣਹੁ ਤੈ ਆਥਵਣਹੁ ਚਹੁ ਚਕੀ ਕੀਅਨੁ ਲੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: augavanahu tai aathavanahu chahu chakee keean loaa |
lines.english: From east to west, He illuminates the four directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਣੀ ਚਉਣੀ ਕਰਾਮਾਤਿ ਸਚੇ ਕਾ ਸਚਾ ਢੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: doonee chaunee karaamaat sache kaa sachaa dtoaa |
lines.english: Your miracles increase two-fold, even four-fold; this is the True Lord's true blessing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਜਾਗੇ ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗੀ ਪੰਚਾਇਣੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੋਆ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: chaare jaage chahu jugee panchaaein aape hoaa |8|1|
lines.english: The four Gurus enlightened the four ages; the Lord Himself assumed the fifth form. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਲਾਲਨਿ ਲਾਹਨਿ ਮੇਲਉ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁੜੁ ਕੀਨੁ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kalaalan laahan melau gur kaa sabad gurr keen re |
lines.english: Make your body the vat, and mix in the yeast. Let the Word of the Guru's Shabad be the molasses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee baanee bhagataa kee | kabeer jeeo |
lines.english: Raamkalee, The Word Of The Devotees. Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
